name: Basic Cannelloni Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the eggs in a blender. Add the water, flour, and salt. Blend until smooth.
2. Scrape down the sides of the container and blend again.
3. Heat a 10-inch nonstick frying pan and lightly oil the pan using a paper towel.
4. Ladle ¼ cup of the batter into the pan and quickly turn the pan to evenly coat the bottom with batter.
5. Cook on one side only until dry on the top, about one minute.
6. The crepes should be only very lightly browned and not too dry; do not let the pan get too hot.
7. Lightly oil the pan before cooking each crepe.
8. Separate the crepes with wax paper until ready to use.
9. Refrigerate overnight if sealed in a plastic bag.
